segments.text: Praise the Lord! Praise God in his sanctuary; praise him in his mighty heavens!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him for his mighty deeds; praise him according to his excellent greatness!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him with trumpet sound; praise him with lute and harp!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him with tambourine and dance; praise him with strings and pipe!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him with sounding cymbals; praise him with loud clashing cymbals!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
